extraction.one_line_summary: DENNIS Rowan bridged solo to VINE Jay on the final climb summit, then time-trialed 8km to win and take GC lead by 1 second from VINE.
tactical_patterns: MATTHEWS Michael chain drop 21km from finish signals automatic attacking opportunity that opposing teams exploited immediately
VINE Jay maximized KOM points over summit but lacked TTing power to hold solo breakaway companion on descent
DENNIS Rowan bridged 45-second gap solo on climb then held wheelsucker YATES at bay through 8km technical descent

rider_signals.DENNIS Rohan: positive: world-class pursuit power to close 45s gap solo on climb, then resist Yates for 8km
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: mechanical at worst moment 21km out eliminated GC contention on crucial MTF stage
rider_signals.VINE Jay: neutral: strong climber took maximum KOM points but lacks time trial engine to defend solo lead
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: sat on Dennis wheel entire descent refusing to contribute, tactical passivity cost stage win
